title: Classification
description: Category vote produced by one classifier ballot and the majority-vote winner of the classify_category node. tie_break=first picks the lowest-index ballot on ties. Matches the inlined S.classify_category_schema table in workflow.js.

category.description: The single best-fit support category for the ticket.

confidence.description: Confidence in the chosen category, 0..1. Used by tie_break=highest-confidence when configured.

rationale.description: One sentence justifying the category from the ticket text.
